series_metadata.series_description: The Employer Policy Account Refunds are documentation supporting the issuing of employer policy account refunds. All Employer Refunds are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS) and the Accounts Receivable I drive.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Employer refunds of $25,000 or higher are scanned into Employer Policy file. daily refund documentation which includes all employer refunds are scanned into I drive Accounts Receivable repository. Once paper records have been scanned and image verified, securely shred. ; Electronic: daily refund documentation on I drive Accounts Receivable repository two (2) years, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved –
